description: Made of nylon for enhanced durabilityOne main zippered compartment with a padded separator and velcro closure to hold a laptop, organiser pouches and a zippered pocketTwo zippered pockets on the front and an insert pocketPadded haul loopPadded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuriesCushioned panels on the back for added comfortErgonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortablyBranded zippers and sliders for easy useNylon bonded thread for long life
